theme_and_archetype.rationale: Warm, editorial, 'workshop-precision' feel for a modular furniture and interior manufacturing company. Fosters trust, physical tangibility, and clear scan-ability without feeling like generic tech.

headings.usage: Used for page titles, kanban column headers, primary KPI numbers, and modal titles. Characterful serif.

body.usage: Clean, highly readable grotesque sans for all dense data, tables, cards, and input fields.

background.description: Bone/off-white paper background for the main canvas, clean white for cards/panels.

text.description: Espresso ink text. Never pure black. Muted tones for secondary labels.

brand_accents.description: Terracotta is the primary interactive CTA color. Walnut for secondary emphasis.

pipeline_stages.description: 6 distinct warm/earthy stage dots. Used for pipeline stage accents, kanban headers, and steppers.

status_heat_chips.description: Transparent heat chips used in lead scoring.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous whitespace for the macro layout (page padding, section gaps) but dense, workshop-precision alignment for micro layouts (data tables, kanban cards).
spacing_and_layout.kanban_layout: Flex-row, gap-4 overflow-x-auto, columns min-w-[320px] max-w-[350px].
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Bento 'Control Room' grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized in cards.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Subtle roundness. Use rounded-md (6px) or rounded-sm (4px). Avoid heavy pill shapes unless it is a specific chip.

kanban_cards.style: bg-white border border-[#E2DCD0] rounded-md shadow-sm p-4 hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#D5C8B5] transition-all
kanban_cards.content_layout: Top row: Client name (Hanken Grotesk 500) + Hot/Warm badge. Middle: BHK chip + layout chip + budget. Bottom: Owner avatar + Project code.
kanban_cards.badges: px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded bg-[#F6F2EB] text-[#5C534D] border border-[#E2DCD0]

stepper.active_node: Solid fill with stage accent color.

kpi_cards.style: bg-white rounded-md p-6 border border-[#E2DCD0] flex flex-col gap-2
kpi_cards.typography: Primary metric in Fraunces text-4xl. Label in Hanken Grotesk uppercase text-xs tracking-wider text-[#8A817C].

buttons.primary: bg-[#C2683D] text-white hover:bg-[#A95A3F] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#8A5A3B] text-[#8A5A3B] hover:bg-[#F6F2EB] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium

inputs_and_forms.style: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E2DCD0] rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-[#2A2421] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C2683D]/20 focus:border-[#C2683D] outline-none

ui_components.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

login.layout: Split screen. Left: Form panel with bone background, soft shadows. Right: Immersive image of modern interior or precision carpentry.

lead_detail.layout: Header with title and status chips. Underneath: 6-stage stepper. Below stepper: Two column layout (grid-cols-12 gap-8). Left col (span 8): Requirement brief, Site Measurements, Revisions. Right col (span 4): Activity Timeline, Payments rail.

lead_scoring.layout: Transparent Lead Scoring screen. Use HTML range inputs styled with accent colors for weight sliders. 'Why?' expander uses a soft bg accordion.
lead_scoring.chips: Hot (Terracotta text, light terracotta bg), Warm (Ochre text/bg), Cold (Slate text/bg).

automations.layout: List of blueprint gates and workflow rule toggles. Live signals feed on the right sidebar (dense list, monospaced timestamps).

command_center.layout: Top: 4 KPI Cards (pipeline value, probability-weighted forecast, win rate, cycle time). Below: Charts. Revenue forecast area chart, pipeline funnel, value by source.
command_center.charts: Recharts. Use desaturated earthy tones for areas. Terracotta for primary lines. Walnut for secondary.

login_background.description: Contemporary kitchen with wood cabinets. Use on the right side of the login screen.

empty_state_1.description: Modern modular kitchen. Use for 'No site measurements yet' or similar empty states with a semi-transparent overlay.

empty_state_2.description: Precision carpentry. Use for empty pipeline or factory production states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Prefer crisp, simple icons.
Add 'recharts' for the Command Center dashboard visualizations.
Add tailwind configuration for 'Fraunces' and 'Hanken Grotesk' fonts from Google Fonts.
Ensure `data-testid` is added to all buttons, inputs, links, and cards for E2E testing.
Do NOT use pure black or default blue. Stick strictly to the earthy color palette provided.
Implement the 6 pipeline stages with their exact color tokens for the stage dots and stepper nodes.
Format currency strictly in Indian format (e.g., ₹ 1.5 Lakh, ₹ 2.5 Crore).
Kanban board must have drag-and-drop capability. Design cards to be compact and scannable.
Lead detail page should have a clear visual hierarchy with the progress stepper acting as the anchor.
Use .js/.jsx extensions for all files, not .tsx. Set up the project accordingly.
